rationale: Phase 06 is additive and replay-safe: Stripe webhooks verify raw-body signatures, capture events idempotently, and defer payment/refund/dispute/grant logic to the outbox worker; checkout uses server catalog pricing and optional Stripe idempotency keys; entitlement gates separate MESSAGE_START from REVEAL_PHONE; refunds, disputes, restorations, and saved-alert delivery revalidation are covered by focused regression tests. Projection/search rollback behavior is unaffected.
